heading: Launch a sharper service page in one focused week
body: A synthetic web-studio offer for founder-led operators who already know the service they need to sell.
notes: Synthetic example using a Pexels License sample image; do not imply depicted-person endorsement.

heading: Positioning, build, and publishing in one loop
body: Clarify the offer, structure the page, review the local preview, then publish the approved artifact to the owner's GitHub Pages target.

heading: What the client needs ready
body: A clear offer, a short proof library, a few approved visuals, and one accountable reviewer. The pack keeps those materials organized before publish.

heading: Review the preview before anything leaves the machine
body: Generate a local artifact first. Publish only after the exact preview is approved.
